sqlMap.select: select * from partialkey where dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#

select partialkeyno, property, seq, dropdownno, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from partialkey where partialkeyno = #partialkeyno# and dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update partialkey set
property = #property# property = null seq = #seq# seq = null
where partialkeyno = #partialkeyno# and dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from partialkey where partialkeyno = #partialkeyno# and dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from partialkey where dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select partialkeyno, property, seq, dropdownno, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from partialkey where partialkeyno = #partialkeyno# and dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#

select partialkeyno, dropdownno, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno, property from partialkey where dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
